productDisplayName: Skechers Men Masterson White Sports Shoes
description: Run less, get more with the skechers Radius Trainer. Fab to look at and a great gift for the feet, this pair of running shoes is designed with the best of technologies to offer absolute comfort and health quicker. The Kinetic Wedge Technology in this shoe intensifies training and burns more calories with each step, delivering a great cardio workout with ease. You get an extra pair of laces in a contrast colour and a DVD on the shoe and how to maximise the technologies for your benefit.  UpperMeshed synthetic upper with strategically placed synthetic overlays for absolute durability, lightweight and mesh for breathable comfortPadded and meshed collar and tongue for in-step comfortLace-up system for a snug, customised FitMidsoleTwo-part firm and soft-density midsole that delivers a rocking effect from the heel to the toe, creating a natural instability and activating lesser used muscles, reducing the stress on joints and the backAnti-microbial form-fitting footbed to wick sweat away and prevent odour, and also increase breathabilityRemovable footbed to accommodate an orthoticRoll bridge using reinforced heel pillars to improve side-to-side stability and control forward motionUltra-soft Resamax Kinetic Wedge Technology extending from the heel to toe, offering a gradual transition with each stride. The softer lower layer of the Resamax provides superior cushioning and creates natural instability, toning the muscles and adjusting the body for proper balance and positioningOutsoleCurved rocker bottom design for smoother heel-strike to toe-off transition, helping you run in a more natural stateMade of durable high abrasion rubber treads for enhanced cushioning and maximum tractionShoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
